$comment: Defines the structural contract for deferred-findings.json — an auditable list of findings the pipeline has agreed not to fix. Content-hash computation algorithm: (1) Read the source file at the finding's current line number. (2) Extract a 5-line window: 2 lines above, the finding line, 2 lines below. (3) If the finding is near the top or bottom of the file, use as many lines as available (window may be 3-5 lines for edge positions; a 1-line file yields a 1-line window). (4) Concatenate the window lines with newlines. (5) Compute SHA-256 of the concatenated string (UTF-8 encoded). (6) Take the first 8 hex characters of the digest. This specification is the authoritative reference — downstream implementers (scanner-normaliser Phase 2, ratchet Phase 5, /retro Phase 6) MUST reference this $comment, not re-specify the algorithm. Validation boundary: this schema enforces structural correctness (field types, enums, regex, minLength). Semantic checks enforced by validate-plan.py --schema (Phase 1, schema-validators task): (a) uniqueness of finding_id across entries, (b) template-pattern detection in reason field (rejecting 'Pre-existing', 'Legacy code', etc.), (c) Deferred state requiring a ticket field (conditional requirement).
